resources.name: Handshake
resources.description: Boston College's official platform for browsing jobs and internships available to BC students, scheduling career-coach appointments, and finding career fairs.

resources.name: BC Career Center
resources.description: Career coaching, career-path guides, recruiting events, and application resources from the Division of Student Affairs.

resources.name: Handshake Guide
resources.description: The Career Center's guide to setting up your Handshake profile and using it to find jobs, internships, and employer events.

resources.name: Undergraduate Research Opportunities
resources.description: Boston College's central overview of undergraduate research programs and how to get involved in faculty research.

resources.name: Undergraduate Research Support (URF & Grants)
resources.description: The Undergraduate Research Fellowship program, Advanced Study Grants, conference travel grants, and thesis research support.

resources.name: University Fellowships Committee
resources.description: Guidance for competing for major fellowships and scholarships such as the Rhodes, Fulbright, Marshall, and Truman.

resources.name: Computer Science: Research
resources.description: Faculty research areas in the CS department, with undergraduate involvement through independent studies and honors projects.

resources.name: Economics: Research Opportunities & Internships
resources.description: The Economics department's page on undergraduate research assistant positions and internships.

resources.name: Biology: Summer Research Experiences
resources.description: Summer research options for Biology students, including NSF REU programs and NIH summer internships.

resources.name: Psychology & Neuroscience Department
resources.description: Department home page with faculty labs, colloquia, and information on joining undergraduate research projects.

resources.name: Student Employment
resources.description: The Office of Student Services hub for hourly paid student employment, including Federal Work-Study information.

resources.name: On-Campus Job Listings
resources.description: Active on-campus student job postings for the academic year and summer, with application instructions.

resources.name: MyBC Organization Directory
resources.description: Browse Boston College's 300+ active student organizations, see upcoming events, and join groups.

resources.name: Office of Student Involvement
resources.description: Programs, leadership opportunities, the annual Involvement Fair, and resources for joining or starting a student organization.
